homepage.heroSubline: Reliable garage door services across Albuquerque and surrounding areas. Quality installation, repair, and maintenance.
homepage.aboutTitle: Your Trusted Albuquerque Garage Door Partner
aboutText: Garage Door Doctor was founded over a decade ago, right here in Albuquerque. We saw a need for honest, dependable garage door services that homeowners could rely on. We're not just another company; we're your neighbors.

Our approach is simple: treat every customer like family. We pride ourselves on clear communication, transparent pricing, and quality workmanship. We don't cut corners, and we stand behind every job we do.
We're committed to serving the Albuquerque community. From sponsoring local youth sports teams to supporting local charities, we believe in giving back. We're proud to be a part of this vibrant city.

valueProps.title: Experienced Technicians
valueProps.description: Our team has years of experience working on all types of garage doors and openers.

valueProps.title: Fast & Reliable Service
valueProps.description: We understand that a broken garage door is an emergency. We offer prompt and reliable service to get your door back in working order quickly.

valueProps.title: Competitive Pricing
valueProps.description: We offer fair and competitive pricing on all of our services. No hidden fees or surprises.

valueProps.title: Quality Workmanship
valueProps.description: We use only the highest quality materials and stand behind our workmanship with a satisfaction guarantee.

homepage.ctaSubline: Call us today for a free estimate!

services.name: Garage Door Installation
services.shortDescription: Professional garage door installation for new homes and replacements.
services.description:
Whether you're building a new home in Rio Rancho or replacing an old, worn-out garage door in Nob Hill, Garage Door Doctor provides expert installation services. We offer a wide selection of garage doors to suit your style and budget, from traditional steel doors to modern wood and aluminum designs. We handle everything from removing your old door to installing the new one, ensuring a perfect fit and smooth operation.

Our installation process includes: removing and disposing of your old door, preparing the opening, installing the new door and hardware, connecting and programming the opener, and thoroughly testing the system for safety and functionality. We pay close attention to detail, ensuring proper insulation and weather sealing to protect your garage from the harsh Albuquerque climate. We also educate you on the proper maintenance of your new door to extend its lifespan.

Considering Albuquerque's diverse architectural styles, we can source specific doors that match the Pueblo Revival, Territorial, or Contemporary styles common throughout the city. We also factor in the intense sun and potential monsoon season when recommending materials, ensuring your new garage door can withstand the elements.
process: Step 1: Consultation and selection of the right door.
Step 2: Precise measurements and preparation of the garage door opening.
Step 3: Professional installation of the door, tracks, springs, and opener.
Step 4: Thorough testing and safety inspection to ensure smooth operation.

faq.question: How long does garage door installation take?
faq.answer: Typically, a standard garage door installation can be completed within 4-6 hours. More complex installations may require additional time.

faq.question: Do you offer a warranty on your installations?
faq.answer: Yes, we offer a comprehensive warranty on all of our garage door installations, covering both parts and labor.

faq.question: Can you install a garage door opener I already purchased?
faq.answer: While we prefer to install openers that we supply to ensure compatibility and warranty coverage, we can often install customer-provided openers. Please contact us for a consultation.

services.name: Garage Door Repair
services.shortDescription: Fast and reliable garage door repair services in Albuquerque.
services.description:
Is your garage door making strange noises, refusing to open, or hanging crookedly? Garage Door Doctor offers comprehensive repair services to get your door back in working order quickly and safely. We understand the inconvenience and security risks of a malfunctioning garage door, especially during Albuquerque's extreme temperatures.

Our experienced technicians can diagnose and repair a wide range of issues, including broken springs, damaged panels, faulty openers, and misaligned tracks. We use only high-quality replacement parts to ensure long-lasting repairs. We also offer emergency repair services for urgent situations.

Given Albuquerque's climate, we frequently address issues related to heat expansion and contraction, which can affect door alignment and spring tension. We are also experienced in repairing damage caused by the occasional hail storms that affect the area. Whether you live in an older adobe home in Old Town or a newer stucco house in the Northeast Heights, we have the expertise to handle your garage door repair needs.
process: Step 1: Thorough inspection to identify the problem.
Step 2: Clear explanation of the repair options and pricing.
Step 3: Efficient and professional repair work.
Step 4: Testing and safety check to ensure proper function.

faq.question: How much does a garage door repair cost?
faq.answer: The cost of repair depends on the nature of the problem. We offer free estimates, so call us and we can provide a more accurate quote.

faq.question: How quickly can you come out for a repair?
faq.answer: We offer same-day and emergency repair services in most cases. Call us to check our availability.

faq.question: Do you repair all brands of garage doors and openers?
faq.answer: Yes, we are experienced in repairing all major brands of garage doors and openers.

services.name: Garage Door Opener Repair
services.shortDescription: Expert repair of all garage door opener types.
services.description:
A malfunctioning garage door opener can be a major inconvenience. Garage Door Doctor specializes in repairing all types of garage door openers, including chain drive, belt drive, and screw drive models. We understand the intricacies of these systems and can quickly diagnose and repair any issues.

Common opener problems we address include: remote control issues, safety sensor malfunctions, motor failures, and gear replacements. We also offer programming services for new remotes and keypads.

Albuquerque's unique electrical grid sometimes experiences power surges that can damage garage door openers. Our technicians are adept at diagnosing and repairing damage from these surges. We also recommend surge protectors to help prevent future issues.
process: Step 1: Diagnose the opener issue.
Step 2: Provide a repair estimate.
Step 3: Replace faulty components.
Step 4: Test and program the opener.

faq.question: Why is my garage door opener not working?
faq.answer: There are several reasons why your garage door opener may not be working, including dead batteries, a tripped circuit breaker, or a faulty motor. Our technicians can diagnose the problem and provide a solution.

faq.question: Can you program a new remote for my garage door opener?
faq.answer: Yes, we can program new remotes and keypads for most brands of garage door openers.

faq.question: How long do garage door openers typically last?
faq.answer: With proper maintenance, a garage door opener can last 10-15 years.

services.name: Garage Door Spring Replacement
services.shortDescription: Safe and reliable garage door spring replacement services.
services.description:
Broken garage door springs are a common problem, and they can be dangerous to handle without the proper tools and experience. Garage Door Doctor offers safe and reliable garage door spring replacement services. We use only high-quality springs that are designed to last.

We replace both torsion springs and extension springs, ensuring the correct size and tension for your door. We also inspect the entire system for any other potential problems.

The dry Albuquerque climate can cause garage door springs to rust and weaken over time. We recommend regular lubrication to help extend their lifespan. We also advise against attempting to replace springs yourself, as serious injury can result.
process: Step 1: Assess the spring type and size needed.
Step 2: Safely remove the broken spring.
Step 3: Install the new spring with correct tension.
Step 4: Test the door balance and operation.

faq.question: How do I know if my garage door spring is broken?
faq.answer: Signs of a broken garage door spring include a loud snapping noise, a door that is difficult to lift, or a door that hangs crookedly.

faq.question: How long does it take to replace a garage door spring?
Are garage door springs dangerous to replace?
faq.answer: Yes, garage door springs are under high tension and can be dangerous to replace without the proper tools and experience. It is always best to hire a professional.

services.name: Garage Door Maintenance
services.shortDescription: Extend the life of your garage door with regular maintenance.
services.description:
Regular garage door maintenance is essential to keep your door operating smoothly and safely, and to prevent costly repairs down the road. Garage Door Doctor offers comprehensive maintenance services to keep your door in top condition.

Our maintenance service includes: lubricating moving parts, tightening hardware, inspecting springs and cables, adjusting the opener, and testing safety features. We also provide recommendations for any necessary repairs.

Albuquerque's dusty environment can cause garage door components to become dirty and worn. Regular cleaning and lubrication can help prevent these issues. We recommend scheduling a maintenance service at least once a year.
process: Step 1: Inspect all components for wear and tear.
Step 2: Lubricate moving parts.
Step 3: Tighten loose hardware.
Step 4: Test safety features and adjust as needed.

faq.question: How often should I have my garage door serviced?
faq.answer: We recommend having your garage door serviced at least once a year.

faq.question: What is included in a garage door maintenance service?
faq.answer: Our maintenance service includes inspecting all components, lubricating moving parts, tightening hardware, and testing safety features.

faq.question: Can I perform garage door maintenance myself?
faq.answer: While some basic maintenance can be done yourself, such as lubricating the tracks, it is best to have a professional perform a thorough inspection and service.

services.name: Garage Door Panel Replacement
services.shortDescription: Replace damaged garage door panels to restore your door's appearance.
services.description:
Damaged garage door panels can detract from your home's curb appeal. Garage Door Doctor offers panel replacement services to restore your door's appearance and functionality. We can match existing panels or replace the entire door if necessary.

We work with all types of garage door panels, including steel, wood, and aluminum. We also offer insulation upgrades to improve energy efficiency.

Hail storms are relatively common in Albuquerque, and they can cause significant damage to garage door panels. We are experienced in replacing panels damaged by hail and other weather events.
process: Step 1: Assess the damage and identify the panel type.
Step 2: Source a matching replacement panel.
Step 3: Carefully remove the damaged panel.
Step 4: Install the new panel and ensure proper alignment.

faq.question: Can I replace just one panel of my garage door?
faq.answer: Yes, in most cases, we can replace just one panel of your garage door.

faq.question: How do I know what type of panel my garage door has?
faq.answer: Our technicians can help you identify the type of panel your garage door has.

faq.question: How long does it take to replace a garage door panel?

serviceAreas.content:
Garage Door Doctor is proud to offer comprehensive garage door services to the residents of Albuquerque, New Mexico. From the vibrant neighborhoods of Nob Hill and the historic Old Town to the sprawling suburbs of the Northeast Heights and the West Side, we are committed to providing top-notch garage door repair, installation, and maintenance services throughout the Albuquerque metro area. We understand the unique needs of Albuquerque homeowners and businesses, and we strive to deliver reliable and affordable solutions tailored to your specific requirements.

Whether you need a quick repair to get your garage door back on track, a complete garage door replacement to enhance your home's curb appeal, or regular maintenance to keep your garage door operating smoothly, Garage Door Doctor has you covered. Our team of experienced and certified technicians is equipped with the latest tools and technology to handle any garage door issue, big or small. We are dedicated to providing exceptional customer service and ensuring your complete satisfaction.
serviceAreas.localContext: Albuquerque, a city known for its stunning desert landscapes, vibrant culture, and unique architecture, presents specific challenges for garage door maintenance due to the dry climate and occasional extreme weather conditions. Garage Door Doctor understands these local factors and provides tailored solutions to ensure the longevity and optimal performance of your garage door.

reviews.name: Maria G.
reviews.text: My garage door spring broke on a Sunday morning, and I was worried about being stuck. Garage Door Doctor came out within an hour and replaced it quickly and professionally. The technician was polite and explained everything clearly. Highly recommend!

reviews.name: David S.
reviews.text: My garage door opener stopped working, and I couldn't get my car out. Garage Door Doctor diagnosed the problem quickly and replaced a faulty sensor. The price was reasonable, and the service was excellent.

reviews.name: Jessica L.
reviews.text: We recently built a new home in Rio Rancho and needed a garage door installed. Garage Door Doctor provided excellent service from start to finish. They helped us choose the perfect door for our home and installed it flawlessly. We are very happy with the results.

reviews.name: Robert K.
reviews.text: I've been using Garage Door Doctor for annual maintenance for the past five years, and they always do a great job. They are reliable, professional, and their prices are fair. I highly recommend them to anyone needing garage door service.

reviews.name: Sarah M.
reviews.text: My garage door was making a lot of noise and not closing properly. Garage Door Doctor came out and fixed the problem quickly and efficiently. The technician was knowledgeable and explained the repair process clearly. I would definitely use them again.

reviews.name: Michael B.
reviews.text: After a particularly nasty hail storm, several panels on my garage door were damaged. Garage Door Doctor was able to source matching panels and replace them quickly. My garage door looks brand new again!
